Description:
Alachlor or 2-chloro-2'-6'-diethyl-N-methoxymethyl acetanilide is an herbicide widely used in the United States, Europe and Japan.
The major source of environmental release af alachlor is through its manufacture and use as as herbicide [760].  Alachlor has been detected in raw, tap, treated, and rain waters at concentrations of ranging from
